firstPass.guidance: Let segment count arise from the transcript. Do not target a minimum, maximum, or preferred numeric range. Split whenever the subject, argument, example, Q&A exchange, or topic meaningfully changes, and avoid both broad catch-all notes and artificial padding. Live streams require full-duration mixed-content extraction under liveStreamExtraction. Mark needsFurtherProcessing=yes unless the transcript was fully chaptered, Q&A was extracted, or intentionally closed without site content.

liveStreamExtraction.guidance: Inspect every live stream across its full duration as mixed classroom-style content. Preserve substantive lecture blocks as chapter or notable_point segments and create one timestamped qa segment for every substantive prompt and response. Explicit Q&A title markers make exhaustive Q&A extraction mandatory. A sampled subset must remain needsFurtherProcessing=yes.

topicLifecycle.contentPass: Add evidence-backed topic slugs to video and segment topic arrays without targeting a tag count or restricting the pass to a fixed starter taxonomy. Do not inspect or edit topics.json during routine transcript or audit work.
topicLifecycle.synchronization: generate:site-data and site:build collect topic usage from every video shard, preserve existing enriched records, and add deterministic default records for newly referenced slugs.
topicLifecycle.exceptionRule: Use AI attention for topic registry work only when synchronization or validation reports invalid data or a taxonomy conflict, or when the user explicitly requests taxonomy work.

contentExhaustion.comparisonScope: Compare the full transcript independently against the current shard on every content-exhaustion review.
contentExhaustion.stopRule: If a pass only rephrases, rearranges, or otherwise churns existing material without adding transcript-backed substance, stop repeating that specific model-and-effort configuration and record it as saturated.
contentExhaustion.reopenRule: Saturation is not permanent completion. Reopen the transcript for review when a materially stronger model, higher effort level, improved method, or new evidence becomes available.

followUpStages.title: Granular Chaptering
followUpStages.description: Partition checked-off lecture or structured episodes into major chapter and notable-point segments after the first overview segment exists.

followUpStages.title: Deep Chaptering
followUpStages.description: Split long lectures and current-affairs streams into durable chapters after the first overview segment exists.

followUpStages.title: Q&A Extraction
followUpStages.description: Extract actual audience prompts and answers from Bruships, Patreon, and live review streams without forcing lecture material into Q&A.

followUpStages.title: Exhaustive Live Q&A Review
followUpStages.description: Repair older or incomplete live-stream shards by reviewing the full transcript, preserving lecture blocks, and extracting every substantive Q&A exchange.

followUpStages.title: Content Exhaustion Review
followUpStages.description: Run an independent full-transcript comparison against the current shard. Stop when that model-and-effort configuration produces churn without new transcript-backed substance, while preserving eligibility for a materially stronger future review.

followUpStages.title: Topic Diagnostics
followUpStages.description: Investigate topic records only after synchronization or validation reports invalid data, duplicate or conflicting taxonomy, or another concrete registry problem.
